text_block_list.text:
One day, I come across Biwa Hayahide in the
hallway, sighing at her reflection in a window.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Ugh, I can't even get the sides to settle down.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Same as ever, I'm afraid. Dealing with another bad hair day. And today's humidity has made things particularly bad. Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry to always ask, but would you mind
taking a look at the back, Tick—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry! Please, don't worry about me. I thought
you were Ticket, for a moment.

Biwa Hayahide wanders off, still sighing all the
while.
